name: ConnectorRegistrationHandler

neutralConcepts: executionOrder: RateLimitGuard=1, CredentialVault=2, IdempotencyCheck=3, StoreDocument=4, EnqueueConnectorRegistered=5
F430 IRateLimitGuardService called at ORDER 1 — before any write
F427 ICredentialVaultService called at ORDER 2 — credentials stored as opaque reference
ConnectorRegistered payload MUST NOT include credentials — only opaque connectorId
storeDocument(connector) at ORDER 4 BEFORE enqueue(ConnectorRegistered) — DNA-8
ConnectorRegistrationFailed emitted on any failure path

ironRules.rule: IRateLimitGuardService (F430) MUST be called at ORDER 1 before health probe.
ICredentialVaultService (F427) stores credentials — ConnectorRegistered payload contains only opaque connectorId.
Idempotency check before any write — DNA-7.
ConnectorRegistrationFailed emitted on every failure path.

keywords: connector registration handler vault credentials rate limit guard idempotency store before enqueue ConnectorRegistered ConnectorRegistrationFailed
